svg.aria-label: AB763 · eyelet board layout — redrawn board layout diagram
svg.text: Redrawn from Fender 'Deluxe Reverb-Amp AB763' layout drawing (C-FD), page 1 — not a trace
Note: the 6.3 V heater twisted pair always routes on the top layer and never joins another run — its crossings are not hop-overs.
